title: Port a keyword-style query to a pipe chain
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.active_admins/0`. Produce a pipe-based query: start from `User`, pipe through `where` for `role == "admin"` and `active == true`, then `order_by` name ascending. Do NOT use the `from(...)` keyword form. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Simple style conversion — no new semantics, just the pipe form of an otherwise trivial query.
